_comment: evolve-loop LLM router config — copy to .evolve/llm_config.json and edit.
_comment2: When absent, all phases use profile.cli (default: claude). Backward-compatible.

phases._comment: Per-phase overrides. Keys are role names (scout, builder, auditor, triage, ...).
phases._comment2: Each entry: { cli, model } where cli is one of: claude | gemini | codex

scout._comment: Example: route Scout to Gemini for research-heavy phase.

builder._comment: Example: route Builder to Claude (default — same as omitting this entry).

auditor._comment: Example: use a specific model string instead of a tier alias.

_fallback._comment: Used for any phase not listed in phases.*.
